arts.ttl: Curtis Jones lights Liverpool touchpaper by dubbing Chelsea idol 'better than Mo Salah'
arts.sum: The Anfield midfielder delivered the bold claim in a conversation with Manchester United legend Rio Ferdinand

arts.ttl: Chelsea agree January transfer reunion as Enzo Maresca set to lose key figure hours before Wolves
arts.sum: Chelsea have agreed to let recruitment analyst Kyle Macaulay reunite with Graham Potter at West Ham United, football.london understands. After just over two years at the club, Macaulay will join Potter in east London after the former Brighton manager was announced as Julen Lopetegui's replacement earlier this month.

arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs Wolves
arts.sum: Chelsea vs Wolves kicks off at 8pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 7.30pm. Live text coverage of Chelsea vs Wolves is also being provided on Monday evening as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca has just fired a warning to Jadon Sancho and Pedro Neto ahead of Chelsea vs Wolves
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has been speaking about Chelsea’s attack in the build-up to his side’s game against Wolverhampton Wanderers later. Nicolas Jackson has come in for...

arts.ttl: Chelsea edge 'close to agreeing £17m' for 19-year-old defender starring in Ligue 1 as the Blues splash the case on yet another teenager
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly edging close to agreeing a deal with sister club Strasbourg for one of their highly-rated defenders amid an injury crisis for Blues boss Enzo Maresca (right).

arts.ttl: Exclusive: West Ham now make contact to sign £10.2m striker but he could actually end up at Chelsea
Deal agreed: Chelsea set to sign €20million wonderkid
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly set to sign Strasbourg defender Mamadou Sarr in a deal worth around €20million, with the player agreeing to the move. The talented 19-year-old looks like an outstanding prospect and should end up being a good investment by the Blues if he continues to develop at his current rate. Sarr previously came up […] The post Deal agreed: Chelsea set to sign €20million wonderkid appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea agree £17m deal for 'young defender' who had not even been linked with Blues move, he was 'unnamed' until now - journalist
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca will be hoping that Chelsea are going to continue to be active in the transfer window during the month of January. The Blues...

arts.ttl: Chelsea to recall Caleb Wiley to facilitate €20m Mamadou Sarr transfer
arts.sum: As reported by RMC Sport, Chelsea are set to complete the transfer of Mamadou Sarr (19) from partner club RC Strasbourg Alsace. L’Équipe have now provided more details of the impending deal. Sarr will…

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Strasbourg defender to sign in summer for €20m fee?
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly close to agreeing a deal worth €20m (£16.93m) to sign one of Strasbourg's defenders during the summer transfer window.
